use_cases: Form submission triggers with multiple visual variants
Navigation CTAs with outlined or filled button styles
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar interfaces
Destructive action buttons with red accent styling
Ghost-style buttons for secondary actions in overlays
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component built on Radix UI primitives with CVA-based variant system. Features 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes including an icon-only option. Supports keyboard navigation with focus-visible ring styling and composable asChild pattern via Radix Slot for rendering as other elements.
